title: Fried Rye Wrap
description: A fermented, dense, crowd-pleasing Ukrainian dish featuring bread rolls air-fried for a healthy and delicious snack.
instructions: Preheat vegetable oil in a deep fryer or large pot to 375°F (190°C).
Mix all-purpose flour, baking powder, and salt together.
Add water to the flour mixture until it forms a dough. Knead briefly.
Roll out the dough into thin circles. Place each circle on a floured surface.
Cut each circle into 4 wedges. Flatten each wedge slightly to create uniform shapes.
Dip rye bread rolls into a small amount of flour, then place them between two flat pieces of aluminum foil. Fry in hot oil for about 2 minutes until golden brown and crispy on both sides.
Remove from heat immediately after frying and transfer to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
